meaning: n.[音]弱拍,上升,兴旺adj.乐观的,欢乐的
examples: He has the upbeat manner of an eternal optimist.
The Defense Secretary gave an upbeat assessment of the war so far.
The tone of the speech was upbeat.
Still, the researchers sound upbeat -- they're saying the work proves that no secret is truly safe.
Nothing spoils an upbeat energized morning more quickly than 1, 038 unread messages in your in-box...
